title: This NotebookLM feature cuts my workload by 50%
summary: NotebookLM's mind map feature generates a visual hierarchy of topics and subtopics from uploaded sources, enabling users to selectively explore relevant content without reviewing entire documents. This workflow optimization reportedly reduces content curation workload by approximately 50 percent.
